---
title: "Jacob Anderson"

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: broadside
  image: images/jacob.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/chejj/
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jacob-anderson-a33b551b0/
---

::: {#hero-heading}

Some say I'm a Data Scientist, Statistician, Machine Learning Engineer, but I say I model for a living. For the past two years, I’ve worked in the pipeline industry, building applied models that detect cracks and corrosion before they evolve into environmental disasters. In the afternoons I moonlight as course assistant for ASU in Master's level Biostatistics programming courses (LSC 540, 541).

When I’m not serving corporate overlords, you’ll usually find me playing tabletop games, sports, watching (and quoting) movies, or traveling somewhere new with my wife.

This website is clearly a work in progress. Any and all non-codes sections are written by me, but any code or work generated or edited by AI is flagged as such.
:::

::: {.home-summary}
## Experience

T.D. Williamson \| Data Scientist II \| June 2024 - Present

ASU \| Data Science / Statistics Course Assistant \| Aug 2025 - Present

Lumea \| Integrations Engineer & Manager \| Feb 2021 - June 2024

NuSkin \| Technical Support (Spanish) \| Nov 2017 - Jan 2021

## Education

Arizona State University \| M.S. Biological Data Science

Brigham Young University \| B.S. Applied Statistics
:::
